summary: The asset slice satisfies the frozen contracts: one numeric proportion source, 9 runtime variants, 81 prop-attach samples, contact gates, deterministic asset rebuilds, unchanged forbidden scene/runtime files, and a visibly slimmer toy silhouette.
requiredChecks: The main orchestrator must complete release .app plus Computer Use verification at the default office camera.
CI or a clean environment should rerun pnpm validate; this worktree passed all 76 validate roots after rebuilding the Node 24 native SQLite module.
Any future silhouette metric change must rebuild assets twice and refresh deterministic-build.json.
residualRisks: P0 independently measures GLB landmarks and contacts but chest width is derived from the manifest geometry contract rather than rescanning mesh vertices.
The capsule chest-to-head ratio is 0.890187 against a 0.9 maximum, intentionally leaving a tight regression boundary.
Perspective and foreground amplification remain scene-camera concerns outside this asset slice.
